title: The Home Care Cost Model: Personal Support, Housekeeping, and Service Mix Decisions for Aging in Place in Canada
author: Dave Cook
description: Working paper presenting a parametric cost model for Canadian home care service-mix decisions across all ten provinces and three territories. Takes Katz ADL, Lawton IADL, cognitive status, mobility status, household composition, and primary diagnosis as inputs and returns a recommended service mix (PSW, housekeeping, nursing hours), private-pay cost, subsidised hours, and a full federal-plus-provincial tax relief stack indexed to the 2026 taxation year. Reference model only; not clinical or financial advice.
